title: VSTEP Listening Practice Test 1
passage:
Hi everyone. Welcome to the VSTEP Listening test.

Part 1: In this part, you will hear a conversation between two friends. 
John: Hey Sarah, did you finish the assignment?
Sarah: Not yet, I'm planning to do it tonight.

(Đây là đoạn Transcript sẽ bị giấu đi lúc làm bài và chỉ hiện ra lúc nộp xong).

questions.content: What is Sarah planning to do tonight?
Where does this conversation likely take place?
